records.question: Which apartments that have related apartment buildings, apartment facilities, apartment bookings, and view unit status records have a related apartment booking with booking status code exactly 'Provisional' and booking start date exactly '2016-04-01 06:28:08', belong to apartment buildings with building manager exactly 'Sydni', building description exactly 'Duplex', and building phone exactly '544-148-5565x2847', and have apartment type code exactly 'Duplex'?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT apartments.apt_id FROM apartments
JOIN apartment_buildings ON apartments.building_id = apartment_buildings.building_id
JOIN apartment_facilities ON apartments.apt_id = apartment_facilities.apt_id
JOIN apartment_bookings ON apartments.apt_id = apartment_bookings.apt_id
JOIN view_unit_status ON apartments.apt_id = view_unit_status.apt_id
WHERE apartment_bookings.booking_status_code = 'Provisional' AND apartment_bookings.booking_start_date = '2016-04-01 06:28:08' AND apartment_buildings.building_manager = 'Sydni' AND apartments.apt_type_code = 'Duplex' AND apartment_buildings.building_description = 'Duplex' AND apartment_buildings.building_phone = '544-148-5565x2847'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT a.apt_id
FROM Apartments a
INNER JOIN Apartment_Buildings ab ON a.building_id = ab.building_id
INNER JOIN Apartment_Facilities af ON a.apt_id = af.apt_id
INNER JOIN Apartment_Bookings ab_book ON a.apt_id = ab_book.apt_id
INNER JOIN View_Unit_Status vus ON a.apt_id = vus.apt_id
WHERE ab_book.booking_status_code = 'Provisional'
AND ab_book.booking_start_date = '2016-04-01 06:28:08'
AND ab.building_manager = 'Sydni'
AND ab.building_description = 'Duplex'
AND ab.building_phone = '544-148-5565x2847'
AND a.apt_type_code = 'Duplex'

records.question: Which apartments have at least 4 bedrooms, exactly 8 rooms, have recorded apartment facilities, have recorded apartment bookings with a booking end date at least 2017-10-07 20:47:19, and have recorded view unit status?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT apartments.apt_id FROM apartments
JOIN apartment_facilities ON apartments.apt_id = apartment_facilities.apt_id
JOIN apartment_bookings ON apartments.apt_id = apartment_bookings.apt_id
JOIN view_unit_status ON apartments.apt_id = view_unit_status.apt_id
WHERE apartments.bedroom_count >= 4 AND apartments.room_count = '8' AND apartment_bookings.booking_end_date >= '2017-10-07 20:47:19'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT a.apt_id
FROM Apartments a
WHERE a.bedroom_count >= 4
  AND a.room_count = '8'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Apartment_Facilities af
    WHERE af.apt_id = a.apt_id
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Apartment_Bookings ab
    WHERE ab.apt_id = a.apt_id
      AND ab.booking_end_date >= '2017-10-07 20:47:19'
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM View_Unit_Status vus
    WHERE vus.apt_id = a.apt_id
  )
